chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Misc. Appl. No.682 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 03.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Naqi Ali, Advocate for the Applicants. Respondent No.2 present in person. Ms. Rubina Qadir, APG a/w Inspector/I.O Irshad Korai and Inspector Sharif Meo, SIO P.S. Surjani, Karachi. ---------- Counsel for the Applicants does not wish to press this Criminal Misc. Application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Shahbaz
